# Demonstration: Static Analysis vs Dynamic Execution Gap

# This test executes external programs
exec echo "Test running"
stdout 'Test running'

exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# Create a simple demo showing what callgraph can and cannot see
mkdir -p demo

# Create a test that runs another program
setstdin #!/bin/bash
mcpdiff --help
echo "test complete"
exec cat > demo/test.sh

exec chmod +x demo/test.sh
exec ./demo/test.sh
stderr 'Usage'
stdout 'test complete'

# The key limitation:
# 1. This scripttest executes multiple programs (echo, mcpdiff, test.sh)
# 2. Static analysis tools like callgraph can't see these dynamic connections
# 3. They only see the static function calls within each individual program
# 4. This is the gap our enhanced testcallgraph will fill by tracking actual execution
